description_long: This is a robust, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a large, rectangular, solid metal head and a long, cylindrical handle. The head is blocky with slightly beveled edges and a smooth, glossy finish, suggesting it is made of steel or a similar metal. The handle is straight, textured with a series of raised rings for enhanced grip, and appears to be constructed from metal, possibly steel, matching the head. The entire hammer is uniformly dark in color, likely black, giving it a sleek, industrial appearance. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear, indicating it is either new or well-maintained. The hammer is designed for delivering powerful blows, suitable for demolition or heavy construction tasks in urban environments.
description: A heavy, black sledgehammer with a large rectangular metal head and a long, textured cylindrical handle, all finished in a glossy black.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, rectangular face of the hammer head and the full length of the textured handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the hammer head and the cylindrical handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite broad face of the hammer head and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the narrow edge of the hammer head and the handle's length.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical steel handle with raised ring texturing for grip, finished in glossy black.
attribute_head_type: Large, rectangular sledgehammer head with flat striking faces and slightly beveled edges, made of solid metal.
